title: Speaking: First Hindi Conversations
description: Practice your first spoken interactions in Hindi using role-play scenarios.

blocks.title: Scene 1: The New Neighbor
blocks.context: You just moved into a new apartment in Mumbai. Your neighbor introduces themselves.
blocks.goal: Greet them respectfully with Namaste, say your name, and say 'Nice to meet you'.
usefulPhrases: मेरा नाम ___ है। (Mera naam ___ hai.) - My name is ___.
आपका नाम क्या है? (Aapka naam kya hai?) - What is your name?
आपसे मिलकर खुशी हुई। (Aapse milkar khushi hui.) - Nice to meet you.

blocks.title: Scene 2: Asking for Help
blocks.context: You need to ask a local shopkeeper a quick question.
blocks.goal: Get their attention politely, ask if they speak English, and thank them.
usefulPhrases: क्या आप अंग्रेज़ी बोलते हैं? (Kya aap angrezi bolte hain?) - Do you speak English?

blocks.prompt:
Practice speaking aloud! Introduce yourself to the mirror in Hindi:
1. Bring your palms together and say 'Namaste!'.
2. Introduce your name (Mera naam... hai).
3. State where you're from (Main... se hoon).
4. Finish with 'Dhanyavaad'.
hints: मेरा नाम लिसा है। (Mera naam Lisa hai.)
मैं अमेरिका से हूँ। (Main America se hoon.)
